SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons

Class AbstractProgram

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.AbstractProgram
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractOnlineProgram, CEEDAYS
public abstract class AbstractProgram extends Object
NIB Abstract program Every program running as a such (so CALLed, CANCELed, etc.) in the NIB framework must extend this class

    functional interface for SECTION delegates

    • AbstractProgram

      public AbstractProgram(Context context)

  • Method Details

    • getLanguage

      public ProgramLanguage getLanguage()

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels the program

    • procedure

      protected abstract int procedure(AbstractNField... args) throws ContextException
      Program body, executed when run. Every program extending Abstractprogram must implement a procedure method.
      Parameters:
      args - arguments
      Returns:
      the program return code
      Throws:
      ContextException

    • run

      public int run(AbstractNField... args) throws ContextException
      This method is invoked at runtime by the NIB framework when the program is called.

      Do not override unless you know what you are doing.

      Parameters:
      args - program arguments
      Returns:
      the program return code
      Throws:
      ContextException

    • allocateStorage

      public void allocateStorage() throws IllegalAccessException
      Throws:
      IllegalAccessException

    • getStorage

      public Memory getStorage()
      Returns the Working-Storage
      Returns:
      the program working memory

      returns the SYSIN assigned to the program
      Returns:

      returns the program name
      Returns:
      program PROGRAM-ID
